description_long: This recliner features a modern, ergonomic design with a high, padded backrest and a separate matching footrest. The upholstery is a smooth, caramel-brown leather or leather-like material, with subtle tufted button details on both the seat and backrest for added comfort and style. The armrests are gently curved and fully integrated into the seat structure, providing ample support. The recliner and footrest both rest on sturdy, black, four-pronged metal bases, giving the set a stable and contemporary appearance. The headrest is generously cushioned and seamlessly attached to the upper backrest, enhancing relaxation. The overall silhouette is sleek and inviting, suitable for upscale urban interiors or lounge areas.
description: A modern caramel-brown leather recliner with a matching footrest, featuring tufted upholstery, curved armrests, and black metal bases. The design is sleek, cushioned, and ideal for stylish urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full padded backrest, seat, armrests, and matching footrest, highlighting the tufted upholstery and overall symmetry.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the recliner's ergonomic profile, thick cushioning, and the height of the headrest and footrest relative to the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back panel and the sturdy black metal base, with the headrest's full width visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the recliner's depth, the curvature of the armrest, and the alignment of the footrest with the seat.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are smoothly curved, fully padded, and seamlessly integrated into the seat structure, covered in the same caramel-brown leather as the rest of the recliner.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into two visually distinct sections: a large, continuous main back panel and a separate, thickly padded headrest attached at the top.
